risk_selected_model.selection_rule: Select higher test macro F1; if macro F1 is within 0.01, prefer the model with stronger business-critical recall.
risk_selected_model.selection_reason: Baseline selected because macro F1 is within 0.01 of the advanced model and business-critical recall is higher.

claim_selected_model.selection_rule: Select higher test macro F1; if macro F1 is within 0.01, prefer the model with stronger business-critical recall.
claim_selected_model.selection_reason: Advanced model selected because it has the stronger test macro F1.
